_comment: MT-113 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: typed pose calibration. The Calibration Panel (spec 10.10.4.1.9) is BLOCKED, so the unresolved record carries a block_reason and the typed marker/hand detail is preserved verbatim, never faked. marker_count for each hand row must be the hand-21 keypoint count (filled by the loader). head_pose drives record_head_pose (yaw +-90 / pitch +-75 / roll +-45 limits).

calibration.block_reason: Calibration Panel (spec 10.10.4.1.9) not yet implementable; values preserved BLOCKED, never faked
